issues.detail: Missing error handling and edge case coverage in the instructions.
No realistic examples provided to illustrate usage.

scenarios.name: CI gate on high-severity deps plus Docker scan
scenarios.rationale: Baseline already knows snyk auth, snyk test --severity-threshold=high, and snyk container test from common usage; treatment additionally invokes snyk monitor for continuous monitoring and uses --file=Dockerfile as documented in the skill.

scenarios.name: Auto-fix vulnerable npm deps plus Terraform IaC scan
scenarios.rationale: Baseline suggests snyk wizard (not in the skill) and steers toward tfsec/checkov for IaC; treatment uses snyk fix for auto-generated dependency upgrade PRs and snyk iac test (with --report to upload) for Terraform/K8s manifests as documented.
